## UserRuntime.IUserLibraryRuntime interface

Runtime materialization layer for user library data.

This interface provides: - Materialization of persisted sessions into runtime editing sessions - Caching of materialized sessions for efficient access - Creation and persistence of new sessions

**Signature:**

```typescript
export interface IUserLibraryRuntime 
```

</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[evictSession(sessionId)](./ts-chocolate.userruntime.iuserlibraryruntime.evictsession.md)


</td><td>

Evicts a materialized session from the cache. The persisted session remains in the library.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[getMaterializedSession(sessionId)](./ts-chocolate.userruntime.iuserlibraryruntime.getmaterializedsession.md)


</td><td>

Gets a materialized editing session from a persisted session. Returns cached session if already materialized, or materializes on demand.


</td></tr>
<tr><td>

[saveSession(sessionId)](./ts-chocolate.userruntime.iuserlibraryruntime.savesession.md)


</td><td>
